title: Cosmium
definition: A proposed noun for the fundamental, living, connective framework of the universe, derived from 'cosmic' and 'mycelium'.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A new name for the cosmos that combines 'cosmic' and 'mycelium', suggesting a living web-like structure similar to fungal networks.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: An original noun created by merging two existing words, 'cosmic' and 'mycelium', to represent the universal fabric of the cosmos with a biological connotation.
difficulty_levels.expert: A neologism that unifies the concepts of 'cosmic' and 'mycelial' within a single term, emphasizing the living, interconnected nature of the universe while offering a foundation for further linguistic development.

extra_fields.insight: The creative blending of existing terms to create a new concept, serving as a powerful tool for world-building and language evolution.
